zh.lifeSummary: 當Walram von Nassau I於大約1146年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯勞倫包格時，他的父親Ruprecht II von Laurenburg15歲，母親(Mädchen)13歲。他和Kunigunde von Ziegenhain至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1197年7月5日在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧享年52歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯阿恩斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walram von Nassau I于大约1146年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯勞倫包格时，他的父亲Ruprecht II von Laurenburg15岁，母亲(Mädchen)13岁。他和Kunigunde von Ziegenhain至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1197年7月5日在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧享年52岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯阿恩斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nassau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Nassau, formerly the seat of an independent duchy. The placename derives from Old High German naz ‘damp, wet’ + ouwa ‘water meadow’.

History: The royal house of Nassau traces its descent from Dudo, Count of Lauenburg, who flourished between 1093 and 1117. His family acquired the county of Nassau in the 12th century. Prince Willem van Oranje-Nassau, otherwise known as William the Silent (1533–84), was the leader of the Dutch revolt against Spain in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Walram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: from a personal name denoting the older brother of the god Krishna, an avatar of the god Vishnu. It means ‘Ram the strong one’, referring to his legendary muscular strength and penchant for using farm equipment (notably the plow) as weaponry. This surname is found mainly in Guyana, and also in South Africa and Trinidad and Tobago. It is apparently not used in India.

en.lifeSummary: When Walram von Nassau I was born about 1146, in Laurenburg, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Ruprecht II von Laurenburg, was 15 and his mother, (Mädchen), was 13. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Kunigunde von Ziegenhain. He died on 5 July 1197, in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 52, and was buried in Arnstein, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walram von Nassau I est né environ 1146, à Laurenburg, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Ruprecht II von Laurenburg, avait 15 ans et sa mère, (Mädchen), avait 13 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Kunigunde von Ziegenhain. Il est décédé le 5 juillet 1197, à Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Arnstein, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walram von Nassau I um 1146 in Laurenburg, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ruprecht II von Laurenburg 15 und seine Mutter (Mädchen) 13. Er hatte mit Kunigunde von Ziegenhain mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juli 1197 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Arnstein, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walram von Nassau I è nato il circa 1146 nel Laurenburg, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Ruprecht II von Laurenburg, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, (Mädchen), aveva 13 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Kunigunde von Ziegenhain. Morì il 5 luglio 1197, nel Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Arnstein, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Walram von Nassau Iが約1146年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズルヘイン-ラン-クレイスラウレンブルグで生まれた時，父Ruprecht II von Laurenburgは15歳，母(Mädchen)は13歳であった。彼はKunigunde von Ziegenhainとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1197年7月5日にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウウンテルランクレイスナッサウで52歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウウンテルランクレイスアルンステインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walram von Nassau I(이)가 대략 1146년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라-크레이스 로런버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ruprecht II von Laurenburg(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 (Mädchen)(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Kunigunde von Ziegenhain(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1197년 7월 5일 독일 플레우ss 헤센-나소 운털라크레이스 나소에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소 운털라h크레이스 아른스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walram von Nassau I nasceu aproximadamente 1146, em Laurenburg, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Ruprecht II von Laurenburg, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, (Mädchen), tinha 13 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Kunigunde von Ziegenhain. Ele faleceu em 5 de julho de 1197, em Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Arnstein, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walram von Nassau I родился около 1146 г. в местности лоуренбург, раин-лахн-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Ruprecht II von Laurenburg было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали (Mädchen), 13. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Kunigunde von Ziegenhain. Он умер 5 июля 1197 г. в местности нассау, унтирлахнкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности арнстин, унтирлахнкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walram von Nassau I nació aproximadamente 1146, en Laurenburg, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Ruprecht II von Laurenburg, tenía 15 años y su mamá, (Mädchen), tenía 13 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Kunigunde von Ziegenhain. Murió el 5 de julio de 1197, en Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Arnstein, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania.
